topics.name: battery_state
topics.description: Latest battery telemetry (voltage, current, charge percentage, status) from the configured source. The header.frame_id identifies which adapter target produced the message.

target_id.label: Target ID Filter
target_id.description: Optional. Leave blank to mirror every BatteryState source on the bus. Set to a specific adapter target (e.g. "rrc0", "main_battery") to restrict the node to a single source. Each message's header.frame_id identifies its origin.

discovery_period_s.label: Discovery Period
discovery_period_s.description: How often to rescan the bus for new BatteryState topics.
